title: disocactus schrankii
intro: Disocactus schrankii, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus or Queen of the Night, is a species of cactus that belongs to the Echinocereus genus. The medicinal properties of Disocactus schrankii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its antiseptic and antiviral properties, which help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Disocactus schrankii can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to internal infections.
